task_completion.description: Navigate to the Create PDF Template page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM 'Create PDF Template' form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the template name to 'Federal Government Quote Template'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' input field contains exactly 'Federal Government Quote Template'.

task_completion.description: Set the template module type to 'Quotes'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Type' dropdown menu is set to 'Quotes'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the template is set to active
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Active' checkbox is checked on the form.

task_completion.description: Enter the required variables into the template body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WYSIWYG editor or text area contains 'Quote Name: $aos_quotes_name' and 'Total Amount: $aos_quotes_total_amount'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required confidentiality notice into the template body
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WYSIWYG editor or text area contains 'CONFIDENTIALITY NOTICE: This quote is subject to Federal Supply Schedule (FSS) terms and conditions. Valid for 30 days.'

task_completion.description: Save the newly created PDF template
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail view of the saved 'Federal Government Quote Template' is shown, indicating successful creation.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the template
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and SuiteCRM UI, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The text was entered into the actual application editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is visible inside the SuiteCRM WYSIWYG editor, not just in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools open modifying the DOM to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected template name is 'Federal Government Quote Template'. The module type must be 'Quotes' (internally AOS_Quotes). The template body must include the variables '$aos_quotes_name' and '$aos_quotes_total_amount', as well as the phrases 'Federal Supply Schedule' and 'Valid for 30 days'.
